---
title: "5.3_sc_Multiome_Figures"
author: "Anna Schwager"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r silence, include=FALSE, message=F, warning=F}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.show = "hold",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# R setup

```{r source, message=F, warning=F}
here::i_am("scripts/5.4_scMultiome_Figures.Rmd")
mainDir = here::here()

set.seed(123)
```

```{r libraries_new, message=F, warning=F}
library(Signac)
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(biovizBase)
library(ggsci)
library(scales)
library(pheatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)
library(rlang)
library(ggpointdensity)
library(tidytext)
library(patchwork)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(destiny)
library(ggalluvial)
library(ggrepel)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(qs)
library(circlize)
library(GeneNMF)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggalluvial)
library(ggforce)
library(ggpp)

```

# Setting directories and input files

```{r dir, message=F, warning=F}
mainDir = here::here()
inputDir =  file.path(mainDir,"input") 
outputDir = file.path(mainDir, "output")
annotDir = file.path(mainDir, "annotation")

outputDir_local = file.path(outputDir, "epigenomic_diffusion") ; if(!file.exists(outputDir_local)){dir.create(outputDir_local)}
outputDir_objects = file.path(outputDir_local, "objects") ; if(!file.exists(outputDir_objects)){dir.create(outputDir_objects)}
outputDir_plots = file.path(outputDir_local, "plots") ; if(!file.exists(outputDir_plots)){dir.create(outputDir_plots)}
outputDir_tables = file.path(outputDir_local, "tables") ; if(!file.exists(outputDir_tables)){dir.create(outputDir_tables)}

snap_dir <- file.path(outputDir_objects, "snap_export") ; if(!file.exists(snap_dir )){dir.create(snap_dir)}
```

# Set colors

```{r col, message=F, warning=F}
mypal <- c("#4eb7b4","#F9C22EFF","#e4722c", "#c94c9d", "#5c4d7d", "#469D76FF", "#f7dcad", "#3C4B99FF", "#DF9ED4FF", "#C93F55FF", "#E59A52FF", "#EDCE79FF", "pink", "grey", "#92C051FF", "#9F5691FF", "black")

cell_cols <- c(
  basal   = "#236ec4",
  luminal = "#ac0000",
  LP      = "#a3215e",
  HS      = "#F9C22EFF",
  Alv     = "#f7dcad"
)

group_cols <- c(CreP_EARLY = "#c0d69f", 
                CreP_LATE = "#61980e",
                CreN = "#5c4d7d",
                Rosa = "#c94c9d")

```

# Load objects

```{r load, message=F, warning=F}
seurat <- qread(file.path(outputDir_objects, "seurat_final.qs"))
seurat_rna <- qread(file.path(outputDir_objects, "seurat_rna_final.qs"))

geneNMF.metaprograms <- qread(file.path(outputDir_objects, "nmf.qs"))
mp.genes <- geneNMF.metaprograms$metaprograms.genes

```

# QC

```{r qc1, message=F, warning=F}
seurat$mark[seurat$Group == "Rosa"] <- "h3k4me1"
df <- seurat@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Exp,
    Group,
    mark,
    log10_fragments
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(log10_fragments),
    !is.na(Exp),
    !is.na(Group),
    !is.na(mark)
  )

df$Group <- factor(
  df$Group,
  levels = c("CreP_EARLY", "CreP_LATE", "CreN", "Rosa")
)

exp_order <- df %>%
  dplyr::distinct(Exp, Group) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Group, Exp) %>%
  dplyr::pull(Exp)

df$Exp <- factor(df$Exp, levels = exp_order)

p_frags <- ggplot(
  df,
  aes(
    x = Exp,
    y = log10_fragments,
    fill = Group
  )
) +
  geom_violin(
    scale = "width",
    trim = TRUE,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_boxplot(
    aes(group = Exp),
    width = 0.15,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ mark,
    scales = "free_x",
    nrow = 1
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_cols) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, NA)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1
    ),
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "log10 fragments"
  )

p_frags
```

```{r qc2, message=F, warning=F}
df <- seurat_rna@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::select(Exp, Group, percent.mt, nCount_RNA_umi, nFeature_RNA_umi) 

df$Group <- factor(
  df$Group,
  levels = c("CreP_EARLY", "CreP_LATE", "CreN", "Rosa")
)

exp_order <- df %>%
  dplyr::distinct(Exp, Group) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Group, Exp) %>%
  dplyr::pull(Exp)

df$Exp <- factor(df$Exp, levels = exp_order)

p_reads <- ggplot(
  df,
  aes(x = Exp, y = log10(nCount_RNA_umi), fill = Group)
) +
  geom_violin(
    scale = "width",
    trim = TRUE,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_boxplot(
    aes(group = Exp),
    width = 0.15,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_cols) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, NA)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "log10_RNA_reads"
  ) + theme_classic() 

p_genes <- ggplot(
  df,
  aes(x = Exp, y = nFeature_RNA_umi, fill = Group)
) +
  geom_violin(
    scale = "width",
    trim = TRUE,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_boxplot(
    aes(group = Exp),
    width = 0.15,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_cols) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, NA)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "N features"
  )

p_mt <- ggplot(
  df,
  aes(x = Exp, y = percent.mt, fill = Group)
) +
  geom_violin(
    scale = "width",
    trim = TRUE,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_boxplot(
    aes(group = Exp),
    width = 0.15,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_cols) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 15)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "% mito reads"
  )

p_genes | p_mt
p_reads 
```

# NMF

## Metaprograms heatmap

```{r nmf_plot, message=F, warning=F}
program_cols <- c(
  MP1  = "#4eb7b4",
  MP2  = "#f7dcad",
  MP3  = "#faeb65",
  MP4  = "#afcf74",
  MP7  = "#d74e7b",
  MP9  =  "#d6e366", 
  MP10 =  "#a76a7f",
  MP12 = "#8c3a56",
  MP14 = "#390918", 
  MP15 = "#f9edd6",   
  MP16 = "#779c37"
)

ph <- plotMetaPrograms(geneNMF.metaprograms, annotation_colors = program_cols)
ph

geneNMF.metaprograms$metaprograms.metrics
```

```{r nmf_save1, message=F, warning=F, eval=F, include=F}
pdf(
  file.path(outputDir_plots, "nmf_heatmap_final.pdf"),
  width = 160 / 25.4,
  height = 150 / 25.4
)

ph
dev.off()
```

## Gene weights

```{r nmf_weights, message=F, warning=F}
df_weights <- purrr::imap_dfr(
  geneNMF.metaprograms$metaprograms.genes.weights,
  ~ tibble(
    gene = names(.x),
    weight = .x,
    MP = .y
  )
)

df_top <- df_weights %>%
  group_by(MP) %>%
  slice_max(weight, n = 10) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(gene_plot = reorder_within(gene, weight, MP))

p_MP <- ggplot(df_top, aes(x = gene_plot, y = weight)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~MP, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_reordered() +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line()
  ) +
  labs(x = "Gene", y = "Weight")
write.csv(df_weights, file.path(outputDir_tables, "TableS4_NMF_gene_weights.csv"))

p_MP 
```

```{r nmf_save2, message=F, warning=F, eval=F, include=F}
ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "genes_nmf.pdf"),
       plot = p_MP  ,
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 220,
       height = 150)
```

## Scores per cell group

```{r nmf_vln, message=F, warning=F}
mp_features <- paste0(
  "MP",
  c(1, 2, 3, 4, 7, 9, 10, 12, 14, 15, 16)
)

cells_keep <- rownames(seurat_rna@meta.data)[
  complete.cases(
    seurat_rna@meta.data[
      , c(mp_features, "annot_rna_joint_alv"),
      drop = FALSE
    ]
  )
]

seurat_crepos <- subset(
  seurat_rna,
  cells = cells_keep
)

p_types <- VlnPlot(
  seurat_crepos,
  features = mp_features,
  group.by = "annot_rna_joint_alv",
  cols = cell_cols[c("basal", "LP", "HS", "Alv")],
  pt.size = 0,
  ncol = 4
) &
  stat_summary(
    fun = median,
    geom = "crossbar",
    width = 0.4,
    linewidth = 0.4
  )

p_cre <- VlnPlot(
  seurat_crepos,
  features = mp_features,
  group.by = "Group",
  pt.size = 0,
  ncol = 4,
  cols= group_cols
) &
  stat_summary(
    fun = median,
    geom = "crossbar",
    width = 0.4,
    linewidth = 0.4
  )

p_types
p_cre
```

```{r nmf_save3, message=F, warning=F, eval=F, include=F}
ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "mps_cell_type.pdf"),
       plot = p_types  ,
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 220,
       height = 150)

ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "mps_cre.pdf"),
       plot = p_cre  ,
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 220,
       height = 150)

```

## Functional enrichment per programm

```{r enrichments, message=F, warning=F}
top_p_HALLMARKS <- lapply(geneNMF.metaprograms$metaprograms.genes, function(program) {
  runGSEA(program, universe=rownames(seurat_crepos),
          category = "H",
          species = "Mus musculus",
          pval.thr = 0.05)
})


top_p_C2KEGG <- lapply(geneNMF.metaprograms$metaprograms.genes, function(program) {
  runGSEA(program, universe=rownames(seurat_crepos),
          category = "C2",
          subcategory = "CP:KEGG_LEGACY",
          species = "Mus musculus",
          pval.thr = 0.05)
})


top_p_C2WP <- lapply(geneNMF.metaprograms$metaprograms.genes, function(program) {
  runGSEA(program, universe=rownames(seurat_crepos),
          category = "C2",
          subcategory = "CP:WIKIPATHWAYS",
          species = "Mus musculus",
          pval.thr = 0.05)
})

```

```{r enrichments2, message=F, warning=F}
df_h <- purrr::imap_dfr(top_p_HALLMARKS, function(x, mp) {
  if (nrow(x) == 0) return(NULL)
  as.data.frame(x) %>%
    mutate(MP = mp)
}) %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05) %>%
  mutate(pathway_clean = gsub("^HALLMARK_", "", pathway)) %>%
  group_by(MP) %>%
  mutate(pathway_plot = reorder_within(pathway_clean, foldEnrichment, MP)) %>%
  ungroup()

df_h <- df_h %>% mutate(overlapGenes = sapply(overlapGenes, paste, collapse = ";"))
#write.csv(df_h, file.path(outputDir_tables, "MP_enrichment_H.csv"))

df_C2WP <- purrr::imap_dfr(top_p_C2WP, function(x, mp) {
  if (nrow(x) == 0) return(NULL)
  as.data.frame(x) %>%
    mutate(MP = mp)
}) %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05) %>%
  group_by(MP) %>%
  slice_min(padj, n = 10, with_ties = FALSE) %>%   # ← keep top 10
  mutate(pathway_plot = reorder_within(pathway, foldEnrichment, MP)) %>%
  ungroup()

df_C2WP <- df_C2WP %>% mutate(overlapGenes = sapply(overlapGenes, paste, collapse = ";"))
#write.csv(df_C2WP, file.path(outputDir_tables, "MP_enrichment_C2WP.csv"))

df_C2KEGG <- purrr::imap_dfr(top_p_C2KEGG, function(x, mp) {
  if (nrow(x) == 0) return(NULL)
  as.data.frame(x) %>%
    mutate(MP = mp)
}) %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05) %>%
  group_by(MP) %>%
  slice_min(padj, n = 10, with_ties = FALSE) %>%   # ← keep top 10
  mutate(pathway_plot = reorder_within(pathway, foldEnrichment, MP)) %>%
  ungroup()

df_C2KEGG <- df_C2KEGG %>% mutate(overlapGenes = sapply(overlapGenes, paste, collapse = ";"))
```

```{r enrichments3, message=F, warning=F}
bind_gsea_list <- function(x, source_name) {
  purrr::imap_dfr(x, function(res, mp) {
    if (nrow(res) == 0) return(NULL)
    as.data.frame(res) %>%
      mutate(
        MP = mp,
        source = source_name
      )
  })
}
```

```{r enrichments4, message=F, warning=F}
desired_order <- paste0("MP", 1:16)

df_enrich <- bind_rows(
  bind_gsea_list(top_p_HALLMARKS, "HALLMARK"),
  bind_gsea_list(top_p_C2WP, "WIKIPATHWAYS"),
  bind_gsea_list(top_p_C2KEGG, "KEGG")
) %>%
  mutate(
    padj = as.numeric(padj),
    score = -log10(padj)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(padj), padj < 0.05)

df_top <- df_enrich %>%
  group_by(MP) %>%
  slice_min(padj, n = 10, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

mat_df <- df_top %>%
  select(pathway, MP, score) %>%
  group_by(pathway, MP) %>%
  summarise(score = max(score), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = MP, values_from = score, values_fill = 0)

mat <- mat_df %>%
  column_to_rownames("pathway") %>%
  as.matrix()

row_order <- apply(mat, 1, which.max)
mat <- mat[order(row_order, rownames(mat)), , drop = FALSE]

annotation_col <- data.frame(
  metaprogram = colnames(mat),
  row.names = colnames(mat)
)

ann_colors <- list(
  metaprogram = program_cols
)

desired_order <- desired_order[desired_order %in% colnames(mat)]
mat <- mat[, desired_order]
annotation_col <- annotation_col[desired_order, , drop = FALSE]

p_all <- pheatmap(
  mat,
  cluster_rows =TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "darkblue"))(100),
  annotation_col = annotation_col,
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  border_color = NA,
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 10,
  main = "MP pathway enrichment"
)

p_all
```

```{r nmf_save4, message=F, warning=F, eval=F, include=F}
pdf(
  file.path(outputDir_plots, "nmf_all_enrich_padj.pdf"),
  width = 170 / 25.4,
  height = 150 / 25.4
)

p_all
dev.off()
```

## MPs vs pseudotime

```{r corr1, message=F, warning=F}
filter_outliers <- function(df, x, y, q = 0.99) {
  xq <- quantile(df[[x]], probs = c(1 - q, q), na.rm = TRUE)
  yq <- quantile(df[[y]], probs = c(1 - q, q), na.rm = TRUE)
  
  df %>%
    filter(
      .data[[x]] >= xq[1], .data[[x]] <= xq[2],
      .data[[y]] >= yq[1], .data[[y]] <= yq[2]
    )
}
```

```{r corr2, message=F, warning=F}
meta_epi <- seurat@meta.data 
meta_rna <- seurat_rna@meta.data

plots <- lapply(mp_features, function(mp) {
  
  df_plot <- meta_rna %>%
    dplyr::select(pseudotime, !!rlang::sym(mp)) %>%
    dplyr::rename(MP = !!rlang::sym(mp)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(is.finite(pseudotime), is.finite(MP)) %>%
    filter_outliers("pseudotime", "MP", q = 0.999)
  
  lab <- "n < 3"
  if (nrow(df_plot) >= 3) {
    cor_res <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(df_plot$pseudotime, df_plot$MP, method = "pearson"))
    lab <- paste0(
      "R = ", round(unname(cor_res$estimate), 3),
      "\np-val = ", format.pval(cor_res$p.value, digits = 3, eps = 1e-300)
    )
  }
  
  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = pseudotime, y = MP)) +
    geom_pointdensity(adjust = 1) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "magma") +
    
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9),
      axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 8),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 8)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "Pseudotime",
      y = mp,
      title = paste("Pseudotime vs", mp)
    ) +
    annotate(
      "text_npc",
      npcx = 0.02, npcy = 0.98,
      label = lab,
      hjust = 0, vjust = 1,
      size = 3.2
    )
})

names(plots) <- mp_features

patchwork::wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 4)
```

```{r nmf_save5, message=F, warning=F, eval=F, include=F}
pdf(
  file.path(outputDir_plots, "MPs_vs_pseudotime.pdf"),
  width = 175 / 25.4,
  height = 150 / 25.4
)

patchwork::wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 4)
dev.off()
```

# Embeddings

## FACS

```{r facs, message=F, warning=F}
emb <- Embeddings(seurat_rna, "facs")
emb_cells <- rownames(emb)

keep <- emb_cells[
  !is.na(seurat_rna$facs_phenotype[emb_cells]) &
  is.finite(emb[emb_cells, 1]) &
  is.finite(emb[emb_cells, 2])
]

seurat_facs_rna <- subset(seurat_rna, cells = keep)

p_FACS_rna <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(
  seurat_facs_rna,
  reduction = "facs",
  group.by = "facs_phenotype",
  colors.use = cell_cols
) + ggtitle("FACS")
```

## UMAPs

```{r umap1, message=F, warning=F}
p_k27 <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(seurat,
                        reduction = "UMAP_spectral_k27",
                        group.by = c("annot_k27_joint"),
                        colors.use = cell_cols) + ggtitle("H3K27me3")

p_k4 <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(seurat,
                        reduction = "UMAP_spectral_k4",
                        group.by = c("annot_k4_joint"),
                        colors.use = cell_cols) + ggtitle("H3K4me1")

p_RNA_all <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(seurat_rna,
                        reduction = "UMAP_spectral_rna_umi_harmony",
                        group.by = c("annot_rna_joint_alv"),
                        colors.use = cell_cols) + ggtitle("RNA")

(p_FACS_rna | p_RNA_all) / (p_k4 | p_k27)

```

```{r umap2, message=F, warning=F}
cells.use <- colnames(seurat_rna)[which(seurat_rna$Barcode == "GTACTATCGCT")]

p_barcode1 <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(sample = seurat_rna,
                                 reduction = "UMAP_spectral_rna_umi_harmony",
                                 cells.highlight = cells.use,
                                 sizes.highlight = 1.5,
                                 colors.use =  "#61980e")

cells.use <- colnames(seurat_rna)[which(seurat_rna$Barcode == "GTAGTCGTAACGATAGTGTAGCTACT")]
p_barcode2 <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(sample = seurat_rna,
                                 reduction = "UMAP_spectral_rna_umi_harmony",
                                 cells.highlight = cells.use,
                                 sizes.highlight = 1.5,
                                 colors.use =  "#61980e")

p_barcode1 | p_barcode2

```

```{r save1, message=F, warning=F, eval=F, include=F}
ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "umap_k4_new.pdf"),
       plot = p_k4,
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 150,
       height = 180)

ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "umap_k27_new.pdf"),
       plot = p_k27,
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 150,
       height = 180)

ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "umap_rna_all_new.pdf"),
       plot = p_RNA_all,
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 150,
       height = 180)

ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "facs_new.pdf"),
       plot = p_FACS_rna,
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 100,
       height = 120)

ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "umap_barcode1_new.pdf"),
       plot = p_barcode1,
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 130,
       height = 140)

ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "umap_barcode2_new.pdf"),
       plot = p_barcode2,
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 130,
       height = 140)

```

## UMAPs by group

```{r umap3, message=F, warning=F}
seurat_rna_plot <- subset(
  seurat_rna,
  subset = Group != "Rosa"
)

seurat_plot <- subset(
  seurat,
  subset = Group != "Rosa"
)

seurat_rna_plot@graphs <- list()
seurat_plot@graphs <- list()
```

```{r umap4, message=F, warning=F}
p_rna <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(sample = seurat_rna_plot,
                        group.by = "annot_rna_joint_alv",
                        split.by = "Group",
                        reduction = "UMAP_spectral_rna_umi_harmony",
                        colors.use = cell_cols)

DefaultAssay(seurat_plot) <- "bin_5k_h3k4me1"
p_k4 <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(
  sample = subset(seurat_plot, cells = rownames(Embeddings(seurat, "UMAP_spectral_k4"))),
  group.by = "annot_k4_joint",
  split.by = "Group",
  reduction = "UMAP_spectral_k4",
  colors.use = cell_cols
)

DefaultAssay(seurat_plot) <- "bin_5k_h3k27me3"
p_k27 <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(
  sample = subset(seurat_plot, cells = rownames(Embeddings(seurat, "UMAP_spectral_k27"))),
  group.by = "annot_k27_joint",
  split.by = "Group",
  reduction = "UMAP_spectral_k27",
  colors.use = cell_cols
)

p_rna <- patchwork::wrap_plots(
  p_rna$patches$plots,
  nrow = 1
)

p_k4 <- patchwork::wrap_plots(
  p_k4$patches$plots,
  nrow = 1
)

p_k27 <- patchwork::wrap_plots(
  p_k27$patches$plots,
  nrow = 1
)

p_rna / p_k4 / p_k27
```

```{r bars, message=F, warning=F}
celltype_order <- c("basal", "LP", "HS", "Alv")
group_order <- c("CreN", "CreP_EARLY", "CreP_LATE")
modality_order <- c("RNA", "H3K4me1", "H3K27me3")

calculate_celltype_proportions <- function(
    seurat_object,
    annotation_column,
    modality
) {

  df_meta <- seurat_object@meta.data %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    rownames_to_column("cell") %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(Group),
      !is.na(Exp),
      !is.na(.data[[annotation_column]]),
      Group != "Rosa"
    ) %>%
    transmute(
      cell,
      Group = factor(
        Group,
        levels = group_order
      ),
      Exp,
      CellType = factor(
        .data[[annotation_column]],
        levels = celltype_order
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(Group),
      !is.na(CellType)
    )

  # Number of cells of each cell type in each experiment
  df_counts <- df_meta %>%
    dplyr::count(
      Group,
      Exp,
      CellType,
      name = "n"
    )

  # Total number of annotated cells in each experiment
  df_totals <- df_meta %>%
    dplyr::count(
      Group,
      Exp,
      name = "total_n"
    )

  # Cell-type proportions within each experiment
  df_prop <- df_counts %>%
    right_join(
      df_totals,
      by = c("Group", "Exp")
    ) %>%
    complete(
      nesting(Group, Exp, total_n),
      CellType = factor(
        celltype_order,
        levels = celltype_order
      ),
      fill = list(n = 0)
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      prop = n / total_n
    )

  # Mean and SD across experiments
  df_mean <- df_prop %>%
    group_by(
      Group,
      CellType
    ) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_prop = mean(prop),
      sd_prop = sd(prop),
      n_experiments = n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      sd_prop = replace_na(sd_prop, 0),
      Group = factor(
        Group,
        levels = group_order
      ),
      CellType = factor(
        CellType,
        levels = celltype_order
      ),
      Modality = modality
    ) %>%
    arrange(
      Group,
      CellType
    ) %>%
    group_by(
      Modality,
      Group
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      # Rescale so that each stacked bar sums exactly to 1
      stack_total = sum(mean_prop),
      mean_prop_scaled = mean_prop / stack_total,
      sd_prop_scaled = sd_prop / stack_total,

      # Upper boundary of each stacked segment
      ymax_stack = cumsum(mean_prop_scaled),

      # Upward-only SD error bar
      err_ymin = ymax_stack,
      err_ymax = ymax_stack + sd_prop_scaled
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  return(df_mean)
}

df_mean_rna <- calculate_celltype_proportions(
  seurat_object = seurat_rna,
  annotation_column = "annot_rna_joint_alv",
  modality = "RNA"
)

df_mean_k4 <- calculate_celltype_proportions(
  seurat_object = seurat,
  annotation_column = "annot_k4_joint",
  modality = "H3K4me1"
)

df_mean_k27 <- calculate_celltype_proportions(
  seurat_object = seurat,
  annotation_column = "annot_k27_joint",
  modality = "H3K27me3"
)

df_mean_all <- bind_rows(
  df_mean_rna,
  df_mean_k4,
  df_mean_k27
) %>%
  mutate(
    Modality = factor(
      Modality,
      levels = modality_order
    ),
    Group = factor(
      Group,
      levels = group_order
    ),
    CellType = factor(
      CellType,
      levels = celltype_order
    )
  )

df_mean_rna <- calculate_celltype_proportions(
  seurat_object = seurat_rna,
  annotation_column = "annot_rna_joint_alv",
  modality = "RNA"
)

df_mean_k4 <- calculate_celltype_proportions(
  seurat_object = seurat,
  annotation_column = "annot_k4_joint",
  modality = "H3K4me1"
)

df_mean_k27 <- calculate_celltype_proportions(
  seurat_object = seurat,
  annotation_column = "annot_k27_joint",
  modality = "H3K27me3"
)
```

```{r bars2, message=F, warning=F}
p_bar_all <- ggplot(
  df_mean_all,
  aes(
    x = Group,
    y = mean_prop_scaled,
    fill = CellType
  )
) +
  geom_col(
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.4,
    width = 0.7
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(
      x = as.numeric(Group),
      xend = as.numeric(Group),
      y = err_ymin,
      yend = err_ymax,
      group = CellType
    ),
    linewidth = 0.45
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(
      x = as.numeric(Group) - 0.09,
      xend = as.numeric(Group) + 0.09,
      y = err_ymax,
      yend = err_ymax,
      group = CellType
    ),
    linewidth = 0.45
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ Modality,
    nrow = 1
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = cell_cols[celltype_order],
    breaks = celltype_order,
    limits = celltype_order,
    drop = FALSE,
    na.value = "grey80"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1),
    limits = c(0, 1.15),
    expand = expansion(
      mult = c(0, 0.01)
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean proportion + SD",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(
      face = "bold"
    ),
    panel.spacing = grid::unit(
      1,
      "lines"
    ),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1
    )
  )

p_bar_all
```

```{r save_bars, message=F, warning=F, eval=F, include=F}
ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "cell_types_per_group_bars.pdf"),
       plot = p_bar_all,
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 200,
       height = 80)
```

## Noodle plots 

```{r noodle, message=F, warning=F}
barcode_use <- "GTACTATCGCT"
clone_col <- "#61980e"

cells.use <- colnames(seurat_rna)[seurat_rna$Barcode == barcode_use]

# 1. Extract coordinates
df_k4 <- seurat@reductions[["UMAP_spectral_k4"]]@cell.embeddings %>% as.data.frame()
df_rna <- seurat_rna@reductions[["UMAP_spectral_rna_umi_harmony"]]@cell.embeddings %>% as.data.frame()
df_facs <- seurat_rna@meta.data[, c("FACS_CD24", "FACS_CD49f", "facs_phenotype")] %>% as.data.frame()
df_clone <- df_rna

# 2. Add modality-specific annotations
df_k4$cluster <- seurat@meta.data[rownames(df_k4), "annot_k4_joint"]
df_rna$cluster <- seurat_rna@meta.data[rownames(df_rna), "annot_rna_joint_alv"]
df_facs$cluster <- seurat_rna@meta.data[rownames(df_facs), "facs_phenotype"]
df_clone$cluster <- "clone_panel"

# 3. Add modality labels
df_k4$mark <- "H3K4me1"
df_rna$mark <- "RNA"
df_facs$mark <- "FACS"
df_clone$mark <- "Clone"

# 4. Rename coordinates to common names
df_k4 <- df_k4 %>% dplyr::rename(x = UMAPspectralk4_1, y = UMAPspectralk4_2)
df_rna <- df_rna %>% dplyr::rename(x = UMAPspectralrnaumiharmony_1, y = UMAPspectralrnaumiharmony_2)
df_clone <- df_clone %>% dplyr::rename(x = UMAPspectralrnaumiharmony_1, y = UMAPspectralrnaumiharmony_2)
df_facs <- df_facs %>% dplyr::rename(x = FACS_CD49f, y = FACS_CD24)

# 5. Keep needed columns and add cell IDs
df_k4 <- df_k4[, c("x", "y", "cluster", "mark")]
df_rna <- df_rna[, c("x", "y", "cluster", "mark")]
df_facs <- df_facs[, c("x", "y", "cluster", "mark")]
df_clone <- df_clone[, c("x", "y", "cluster", "mark")]

df_k4$cell <- rownames(df_k4)
df_rna$cell <- rownames(df_rna)
df_facs$cell <- rownames(df_facs)
df_clone$cell <- rownames(df_clone)

df_clone$is_clone <- df_clone$cell %in% cells.use

# 6. Transform FACS to log10 scale
df_facs <- df_facs %>% mutate(x = log10(x + 1), y = log10(y + 1))

# 7. Rescale each modality separately
df_k4 <- df_k4 %>% mutate(x = rescale(x, to = c(0, 0.8)), y = rescale(y, to = c(0, 1)))
df_rna <- df_rna %>% mutate(x = rescale(x, to = c(0, 0.8)), y = rescale(y, to = c(0, 1)))
df_clone <- df_clone %>% mutate(x = rescale(x, to = c(0, 0.8)), y = rescale(y, to = c(0, 1)))
df_facs <- df_facs %>% mutate(x = rescale(x, to = c(0.2, 0.8)), y = rescale(y, to = c(0.2, 0.8)))

# 8. Place panels
# Layout:
#   FACS      RNA
#   H3K4me1   Barcode
gap_x <- 1.25
gap_y <- 1.6

df_facs <- df_facs %>% mutate(x = x, y = y + gap_y)
df_rna <- df_rna %>% mutate(x = x + gap_x, y = y + gap_y)
df_k4 <- df_k4 %>% mutate(x = x, y = y)
df_clone <- df_clone %>% mutate(x = x + gap_x, y = y)

df_facs$x <- df_facs$x - 0.3
df_k4$x <- df_k4$x 

# 9. Store all panels
df_rna_all <- df_rna
df_k4_all <- df_k4
df_facs_all <- df_facs
df_clone_all <- df_clone

df_rna_all$cluster <- trimws(as.character(df_rna_all$cluster))
df_k4_all$cluster <- trimws(as.character(df_k4_all$cluster))
df_facs_all$cluster <- trimws(as.character(df_facs_all$cluster))

levels_order <- c("basal", "luminal", "LP", "HS", "Alv")

points.long <- bind_rows(df_facs_all, df_rna_all, df_k4_all)
points.long$cluster <- factor(trimws(as.character(points.long$cluster)), levels = levels_order)

# 10. Build omics-to-omics segments 
common_cells <- Reduce(intersect, list(df_rna_all$cell, df_k4_all$cell, df_facs_all$cell))

df_rna_common <- df_rna_all[df_rna_all$cell %in% common_cells, ]
df_k4_common <- df_k4_all[df_k4_all$cell %in% common_cells, ]
df_facs_common <- df_facs_all[df_facs_all$cell %in% common_cells, ]

seg_rna_k4 <- data.frame(
  x = df_rna_common$x,
  y = df_rna_common$y,
  xend = df_k4_common$x[match(df_rna_common$cell, df_k4_common$cell)],
  yend = df_k4_common$y[match(df_rna_common$cell, df_k4_common$cell)],
  cluster = df_rna_common$cluster,
  cell = df_rna_common$cell,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

seg_rna_facs <- data.frame(
  x = df_rna_common$x,
  y = df_rna_common$y,
  xend = df_facs_common$x[match(df_rna_common$cell, df_facs_common$cell)],
  yend = df_facs_common$y[match(df_rna_common$cell, df_facs_common$cell)],
  cluster = df_rna_common$cluster,
  cell = df_rna_common$cell,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

seg_k4_facs <- data.frame(
  x = df_k4_common$x,
  y = df_k4_common$y,
  xend = df_facs_common$x[match(df_k4_common$cell, df_facs_common$cell)],
  yend = df_facs_common$y[match(df_k4_common$cell, df_facs_common$cell)],
  cluster = df_k4_common$cluster,
  cell = df_k4_common$cell,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

seg_rna_k4$cluster <- factor(trimws(as.character(seg_rna_k4$cluster)), levels = levels_order)
seg_rna_facs$cluster <- factor(trimws(as.character(seg_rna_facs$cluster)), levels = levels_order)
seg_k4_facs$cluster <- factor(trimws(as.character(seg_k4_facs$cluster)), levels = levels_order)
segments.omics <- bind_rows(seg_rna_k4, seg_rna_facs, seg_k4_facs)

# 11. Build clone-specific green links
make_clone_seg <- function(df_clone, df_other, cells.use) {
  common <- intersect(intersect(df_clone$cell, df_other$cell), cells.use)
  d1 <- df_clone[match(common, df_clone$cell), ]
  d2 <- df_other[match(common, df_other$cell), ]
  data.frame(x = d1$x, y = d1$y, xend = d2$x, yend = d2$y, cell = common, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

seg_clone_facs <- make_clone_seg(df_clone_all, df_facs_all, cells.use)
seg_clone_rna <- make_clone_seg(df_clone_all, df_rna_all, cells.use)
seg_clone_k4 <- make_clone_seg(df_clone_all, df_k4_all, cells.use)
segments.clone <- bind_rows(seg_clone_facs, seg_clone_rna, seg_clone_k4)

p_four_panel_omics_links_plus_clone_k4 <- ggplot() +
  geom_segment(data = seg_rna_k4, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend, color = cluster), alpha = 0.05, linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_segment(data = seg_rna_facs, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend, color = cluster), alpha = 0.05, linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_segment(data = seg_k4_facs, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend, color = cluster), alpha = 0.05, linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_segment(data = segments.clone, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend), color = clone_col, alpha = 0.45, linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_point(data = df_facs_all, aes(x = x, y = y, color = cluster), size = 0.9) +
  geom_point(data = df_rna_all, aes(x = x, y = y, color = cluster), size = 0.9) +
  geom_point(data = df_k4_all, aes(x = x, y = y, color = cluster), size = 0.9) +
  geom_point(data = df_clone_all, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "grey75", size = 0.9) +
  geom_point(data = df_clone_all %>% filter(is_clone), aes(x = x, y = y), shape = 21, fill = clone_col, color = "black", stroke = 0.35, size = 1.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cell_cols, na.value = "grey80") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.38, y = gap_y + 1.08, label = "FACS", size = 5) +
  annotate("text", x = gap_x + 0.5, y = gap_y + 1.08, label = "RNA", size = 5) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.62, y = 1.08, label = "H3K4me1", size = 5) +
  annotate("text", x = gap_x + 0.5, y = 1.08, label = paste0("Barcode: ", barcode_use), size = 4) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-0.25, gap_x + 1.1), ylim = c(-0.1, gap_y + 1.15), clip = "off") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.title = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), legend.position = "right")

p_four_panel_omics_links_plus_clone_k4

```

```{r noodle2, message=F, warning=F}
barcode_use <- "GTAGTCGTAACGATAGTGTAGCTACT"
clone_col <- "#61980e"

cells.use <- colnames(seurat_rna)[seurat_rna$Barcode == barcode_use]

# 1. Extract coordinates
df_k27 <- seurat@reductions[["UMAP_spectral_k27"]]@cell.embeddings %>% as.data.frame()
df_rna <- seurat_rna@reductions[["UMAP_spectral_rna_umi_harmony"]]@cell.embeddings %>% as.data.frame()
df_facs <- seurat_rna@meta.data[, c("FACS_CD24", "FACS_CD49f", "facs_phenotype")] %>% as.data.frame()
df_clone <- df_rna

# 2. Add modality-specific annotations
df_k27$cluster <- seurat@meta.data[rownames(df_k27), "annot_k27_joint"]
df_rna$cluster <- seurat_rna@meta.data[rownames(df_rna), "annot_rna_joint_alv"]
df_facs$cluster <- seurat_rna@meta.data[rownames(df_facs), "facs_phenotype"]
df_clone$cluster <- "clone_panel"

# 3. Add modality labels
df_k27$mark <- "H3K27me3"
df_rna$mark <- "RNA"
df_facs$mark <- "FACS"
df_clone$mark <- "Clone"

# 4. Rename coordinates to common names
df_k27 <- df_k27 %>% dplyr::rename(x = UMAPspectralk27_1, y = UMAPspectralk27_2)
df_rna <- df_rna %>% dplyr::rename(x = UMAPspectralrnaumiharmony_1, y = UMAPspectralrnaumiharmony_2)
df_clone <- df_clone %>% dplyr::rename(x = UMAPspectralrnaumiharmony_1, y = UMAPspectralrnaumiharmony_2)
df_facs <- df_facs %>% dplyr::rename(x = FACS_CD49f, y = FACS_CD24)

# 5. Keep needed columns and add cell IDs
df_k27 <- df_k27[, c("x", "y", "cluster", "mark")]
df_rna <- df_rna[, c("x", "y", "cluster", "mark")]
df_facs <- df_facs[, c("x", "y", "cluster", "mark")]
df_clone <- df_clone[, c("x", "y", "cluster", "mark")]

df_k27$cell <- rownames(df_k27)
df_rna$cell <- rownames(df_rna)
df_facs$cell <- rownames(df_facs)
df_clone$cell <- rownames(df_clone)

df_clone$is_clone <- df_clone$cell %in% cells.use

# 6. Transform FACS to log10 scale
df_facs <- df_facs %>% mutate(x = log10(x + 1), y = log10(y + 1))

# 7. Rescale each modality separately
df_k27 <- df_k27 %>% mutate(x = rescale(x, to = c(0, 0.8)), y = rescale(y, to = c(0, 1)))
df_rna <- df_rna %>% mutate(x = rescale(x, to = c(0, 0.8)), y = rescale(y, to = c(0, 1)))
df_clone <- df_clone %>% mutate(x = rescale(x, to = c(0, 0.8)), y = rescale(y, to = c(0, 1)))
df_facs <- df_facs %>% mutate(x = rescale(x, to = c(0.2, 0.8)), y = rescale(y, to = c(0.2, 0.8)))

# 8. Place panels
# Layout:
#   FACS       RNA
#   H3K27me3   Barcode
gap_x <- 1.25
gap_y <- 1.6

df_facs <- df_facs %>% mutate(x = x, y = y + gap_y)
df_rna <- df_rna %>% mutate(x = x + gap_x, y = y + gap_y)
df_k27 <- df_k27 %>% mutate(x = x, y = y)
df_clone <- df_clone %>% mutate(x = x + gap_x, y = y)

df_facs$x <- df_facs$x - 0.3
df_k27$x <- df_k27$x

# 9. Store all panels
df_rna_all <- df_rna
df_k27_all <- df_k27
df_facs_all <- df_facs
df_clone_all <- df_clone

df_rna_all$cluster <- trimws(as.character(df_rna_all$cluster))
df_k27_all$cluster <- trimws(as.character(df_k27_all$cluster))
df_facs_all$cluster <- trimws(as.character(df_facs_all$cluster))

levels_order <- c("basal", "luminal", "LP", "HS", "Alv")

points.long <- bind_rows(df_facs_all, df_rna_all, df_k27_all)
points.long$cluster <- factor(trimws(as.character(points.long$cluster)), levels = levels_order)

# 10. Build omics-to-omics segments
common_cells <- Reduce(intersect, list(df_rna_all$cell, df_k27_all$cell, df_facs_all$cell))

df_rna_common <- df_rna_all[df_rna_all$cell %in% common_cells, ]
df_k27_common <- df_k27_all[df_k27_all$cell %in% common_cells, ]
df_facs_common <- df_facs_all[df_facs_all$cell %in% common_cells, ]

seg_rna_k27 <- data.frame(
  x = df_rna_common$x,
  y = df_rna_common$y,
  xend = df_k27_common$x[match(df_rna_common$cell, df_k27_common$cell)],
  yend = df_k27_common$y[match(df_rna_common$cell, df_k27_common$cell)],
  cluster = df_rna_common$cluster,
  cell = df_rna_common$cell,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

seg_rna_facs <- data.frame(
  x = df_rna_common$x,
  y = df_rna_common$y,
  xend = df_facs_common$x[match(df_rna_common$cell, df_facs_common$cell)],
  yend = df_facs_common$y[match(df_rna_common$cell, df_facs_common$cell)],
  cluster = df_rna_common$cluster,
  cell = df_rna_common$cell,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

seg_k27_facs <- data.frame(
  x = df_k27_common$x,
  y = df_k27_common$y,
  xend = df_facs_common$x[match(df_k27_common$cell, df_facs_common$cell)],
  yend = df_facs_common$y[match(df_k27_common$cell, df_facs_common$cell)],
  cluster = df_k27_common$cluster,
  cell = df_k27_common$cell,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

seg_rna_k27$cluster <- factor(trimws(as.character(seg_rna_k27$cluster)), levels = levels_order)
seg_rna_facs$cluster <- factor(trimws(as.character(seg_rna_facs$cluster)), levels = levels_order)
seg_k27_facs$cluster <- factor(trimws(as.character(seg_k27_facs$cluster)), levels = levels_order)
segments.omics <- bind_rows(seg_rna_k27, seg_rna_facs, seg_k27_facs)

# 11. Build clone-specific green links
make_clone_seg <- function(df_clone, df_other, cells.use) {
  common <- intersect(intersect(df_clone$cell, df_other$cell), cells.use)
  d1 <- df_clone[match(common, df_clone$cell), ]
  d2 <- df_other[match(common, df_other$cell), ]
  data.frame(x = d1$x, y = d1$y, xend = d2$x, yend = d2$y, cell = common, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

seg_clone_facs <- make_clone_seg(df_clone_all, df_facs_all, cells.use)
seg_clone_rna <- make_clone_seg(df_clone_all, df_rna_all, cells.use)
seg_clone_k27 <- make_clone_seg(df_clone_all, df_k27_all, cells.use)
segments.clone <- bind_rows(seg_clone_facs, seg_clone_rna, seg_clone_k27)

p_four_panel_omics_links_plus_clone_k27 <- ggplot() +
  geom_segment(data = seg_rna_k27, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend, color = cluster), alpha = 0.05, linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_segment(data = seg_rna_facs, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend, color = cluster), alpha = 0.05, linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_segment(data = seg_k27_facs, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend, color = cluster), alpha = 0.05, linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_segment(data = segments.clone, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend), color = clone_col, alpha = 0.45, linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_point(data = df_facs_all, aes(x = x, y = y, color = cluster), size = 0.9) +
  geom_point(data = df_rna_all, aes(x = x, y = y, color = cluster), size = 0.9) +
  geom_point(data = df_k27_all, aes(x = x, y = y, color = cluster), size = 0.9) +
  geom_point(data = df_clone_all, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "grey75", size = 0.9) +
  geom_point(data = df_clone_all %>% filter(is_clone), aes(x = x, y = y), shape = 21, fill = clone_col, color = "black", stroke = 0.35, size = 1.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cell_cols, na.value = "grey80") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.38, y = gap_y + 1.08, label = "FACS", size = 5) +
  annotate("text", x = gap_x + 0.5, y = gap_y + 1.08, label = "RNA", size = 5) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.62, y = 1.08, label = "H3K27me3", size = 5) +
  annotate("text", x = gap_x + 0.5, y = 1.08, label = paste0("Barcode: ", barcode_use), size = 4) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-0.25, gap_x + 1.1), ylim = c(-0.1, gap_y + 1.15), clip = "off") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.title = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), legend.position = "right")

p_four_panel_omics_links_plus_clone_k27

```

```{r save6, message=F, warning=F, eval=F, include=F}
ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "square_k4_all_new.pdf"),
       plot = p_four_panel_omics_links_plus_clone_k4,
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 220,
       height = 160)

ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "square_k27_all_new.pdf"),
       plot = p_four_panel_omics_links_plus_clone_k27,
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 220,
       height = 160)


ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "square_k4_all_new_segments.pdf"),
       plot = p_four_panel_segments_only_k4,
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 220,
       height = 160)

ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "square_k27_all_new_segments.pdf"),
       plot = p_four_panel_segments_only_k27,
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 220,
       height = 160)

```

# Barcode plots

```{r barcode, message=F, warning=F}
meta_joint <- meta_rna %>%
  arrange(Barcode)

barcodes <- unique(meta_joint$Barcode)
Ncol <- length(barcodes)

mycols_barcode <- colorRampPalette(rev(brewer.pal(11, "Paired")))(Ncol)
names(mycols_barcode) <- barcodes

```

```{r barcode2, message=F, warning=F}
df_count <- meta_joint %>%
  dplyr::select(Barcode, annot_rna_joint_alv) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(Barcode),
    !is.na(annot_rna_joint_alv)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::count(Barcode, annot_rna_joint_alv, name = "n")

mat <- df_count %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = annot_rna_joint_alv,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(mat) <- mat$Barcode
mat <- as.matrix(mat[, -1, drop = FALSE])

barcodes_plot <- intersect(names(mycols_barcode), rownames(mat))

mat <- mat[barcodes_plot, , drop = FALSE]
grid_cols <- c(mycols_barcode[barcodes_plot], cell_cols)

```

```{r barcode3, message=F, warning=F}
#pdf(file.path(outputDir_plots, "barcode_chord_plot_new.pdf"), width = 6, height = 6)
circos.clear()
circos.par(gap.degree = c(rep(1, nrow(mat) - 1), 8, rep(6, ncol(mat) - 1), 12))

chordDiagram(
  x = mat,
  grid.col = grid_cols,
  transparency = 0.2,
  annotationTrack = "grid",
  preAllocateTracks = 1,
  directional = 0
)

circos.trackPlotRegion(
  track.index = 1,
  panel.fun = function(x, y) {
    sector.name <- get.cell.meta.data("sector.index")
    if (sector.name %in% colnames(mat)) {
      xlim <- get.cell.meta.data("xlim")
      ylim <- get.cell.meta.data("ylim")
      circos.text(
        x = mean(xlim),
        y = ylim[1] + 0.1,
        labels = sector.name,
        facing = "bending.outside",
        niceFacing = TRUE,
        cex = 0.8
      )
    }
  },
  bg.border = NA
)

#dev.off()
```

```{r barcode4, message=F, warning=F}
multi_fate_barcodes <- df_count %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Barcode) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(n_fates = dplyr::n_distinct(annot_rna_joint_alv), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::filter(n_fates > 1) %>%
  dplyr::pull(Barcode)

df_count2 <- df_count %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% multi_fate_barcodes)

barcode_order <- df_count2 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Barcode) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(total_n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(total_n)) %>%
  dplyr::pull(Barcode)

mat <- df_count2 %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = annot_rna_joint_alv,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(mat) <- mat$Barcode
mat <- as.matrix(mat[, -1, drop = FALSE])
mat <- mat[barcode_order, , drop = FALSE]
mat <- mat[, c("LP", "Alv", "basal"), drop = FALSE]

```

```{r barcode5, message=F, warning=F}
#pdf(file.path(outputDir_plots, "multi_barcode_chord_plot_new.pdf"), width = 6, height = 6)
circos.clear()
circos.par(gap.degree = c(rep(1, nrow(mat) - 1), 8, rep(6, ncol(mat) - 1), 12))

link_colors <- matrix(
  cell_cols[colnames(mat)],
  nrow = nrow(mat),
  ncol = ncol(mat),
  byrow = TRUE
)

chordDiagram(
  x = mat,
  grid.col = grid_cols,
  col = link_colors,
  transparency = 0.2,
  annotationTrack = "grid",
  preAllocateTracks = 1,
  directional = 0
)

circos.trackPlotRegion(
  track.index = 1,
  panel.fun = function(x, y) {
    sector.name <- get.cell.meta.data("sector.index")
    if (sector.name %in% colnames(mat)) {
      xlim <- get.cell.meta.data("xlim")
      ylim <- get.cell.meta.data("ylim")
      circos.text(
        x = mean(xlim),
        y = ylim[1] + 0.1,
        labels = sector.name,
        facing = "bending.outside",
        niceFacing = TRUE,
        cex = 0.8
      )
    }
  },
  bg.border = NA
)

#dev.off()
```

# Alluvial plots

```{r alluvial1, message=F, warning=F}
df_alluvial <- meta_joint %>%
  dplyr::select(facs_phenotype, annot_rna_joint_alv, annot_k4_joint, annot_k27_joint, Group, Exp) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(facs_phenotype),
    !is.na(annot_rna_joint_alv),
    !is.na(annot_k27_joint) | !is.na(annot_k4_joint),
    Group != "Rosa",
    !Exp %in% c("exp4", "exp5")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    annot_epi = dplyr::coalesce(annot_k4_joint, annot_k27_joint)
  )

df_plot_late <- df_alluvial %>% 
    dplyr::filter(
    Group == "CreP_LATE") %>%
    dplyr::count(facs_phenotype, annot_rna_joint_alv, annot_epi) %>%
  dplyr::select(facs_phenotype, annot_rna_joint_alv, annot_epi, n)

df_plot_early <- df_alluvial %>% 
    dplyr::filter(
    Group == "CreP_EARLY") %>%
    dplyr::count(facs_phenotype, annot_rna_joint_alv, annot_epi) %>%
  dplyr::select(facs_phenotype, annot_rna_joint_alv, annot_epi, n)

df_plot_neg <- df_alluvial %>% 
    dplyr::filter(
    Group == "CreN",
    annot_rna_joint_alv == "LP") %>%
    dplyr::count(facs_phenotype, annot_rna_joint_alv, annot_epi) %>%
  dplyr::select(facs_phenotype, annot_rna_joint_alv, annot_epi, n)

```

```{r alluvial2, message=F, warning=F}
df_par <- ggforce::gather_set_data(df_plot_neg, 1:3)
df_par$x <- factor(df_par$x, levels = c("facs_phenotype", "annot_rna_joint_alv", "annot_epi"))
p_all_neg_both <- ggplot(
  df_par,
  aes(x = x, id = id, split = y, value = n)
) +
  geom_parallel_sets(
    fill = "grey70",
    alpha = 0.5,
    axis.width = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_parallel_sets_axes(
    aes(fill = y),
    axis.width = 0.15,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_parallel_sets_labels(
    angle = 0,
    size = 3
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cell_cols, na.value = "grey80") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("FACS", "RNA", "K27")) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  )

df_par <- ggforce::gather_set_data(df_plot_early, 1:3)
df_par$x <- factor(df_par$x, levels = c("facs_phenotype", "annot_rna_joint_alv", "annot_epi"))
p_all_early_both <- ggplot(
  df_par,
  aes(x = x, id = id, split = y, value = n)
) +
  geom_parallel_sets(
    fill = "grey70",
    alpha = 0.5,
    axis.width = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_parallel_sets_axes(
    aes(fill = y),
    axis.width = 0.15,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_parallel_sets_labels(
    angle = 0,
    size = 3
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cell_cols, na.value = "grey80") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("FACS", "RNA", "K27")) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  )

df_par <- ggforce::gather_set_data(df_plot_late, 1:3)
df_par$x <- factor(df_par$x, levels = c("facs_phenotype", "annot_rna_joint_alv", "annot_epi"))
p_all_late_both <- ggplot(
  df_par,
  aes(x = x, id = id, split = y, value = n)
) +
  geom_parallel_sets(
    fill = "grey70",
    alpha = 0.5,
    axis.width = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_parallel_sets_axes(
    aes(fill = y),
    axis.width = 0.15,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_parallel_sets_labels(
    angle = 0,
    size = 3
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cell_cols, na.value = "grey80") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("FACS", "RNA", "K27")) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  )

p_all_neg_both | p_all_early_both | p_all_late_both

```

```{r save7, message=F, warning=F, eval=F, include=F}
ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "alluvials_both_new.pdf"),
       plot = (p_all_neg_both | p_all_early_both | p_all_late_both),
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 360,
       height = 100)

```

# Donut plots

```{r donut1, message=F, warning=F}
df_cells <- meta_joint %>%
  dplyr::select(facs_phenotype, annot_rna_joint_alv, annot_k4_joint, annot_k27_joint, Group, Exp) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    annot_epi = dplyr::coalesce(annot_k4_joint, annot_k27_joint)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(annot_rna_joint_alv),
    !is.na(annot_epi),
     Group != "Rosa",
    !Exp %in% c("exp4", "exp5")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    concordance_facs_rna = dplyr::case_when(
      facs_phenotype == "basal"   & annot_rna_joint_alv == "basal" ~ "Concordant",
      facs_phenotype == "luminal" & annot_rna_joint_alv %in% c("LP", "HS", "Alv") ~ "Concordant",
      TRUE ~ "Discordant"
    ),
      concordance_facs_epi = dplyr::case_when(
      facs_phenotype == "basal"   & annot_epi == "basal" ~ "Concordant",
      facs_phenotype == "luminal" & annot_epi %in% c("LP", "HS", "Alv") ~ "Concordant",
      TRUE ~ "Discordant"
    ),
    concordance_rna_epi = dplyr::case_when(
      annot_rna_joint_alv == "basal" & annot_epi == "basal" ~ "Concordant",
      annot_rna_joint_alv %in% c("LP", "HS", "Alv") & annot_epi %in% c("LP", "HS", "Alv") ~ "Concordant",
      TRUE ~ "Discordant"
    ),
    alternative_fate_rna = dplyr::case_when(
      annot_rna_joint_alv == "LP" ~ "Not alternative",
      TRUE ~ "Alternative"
    ),
    alternative_fate_epi = dplyr::case_when(
      annot_epi == "LP" ~ "Not alternative",
      TRUE ~ "Alternative"
    )
  )

df_cells <- df_cells %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    fate_facs_rna = dplyr::case_when(
      concordance_facs_rna == "Concordant" & annot_rna_joint_alv == "LP" ~ "Concordant LP",
      concordance_facs_rna == "Concordant" & annot_rna_joint_alv %in% c("basal") ~ "Concordant basal",
      concordance_facs_rna == "Concordant" & annot_rna_joint_alv %in% c("HS") ~ "Concordant HS",
      concordance_facs_rna == "Concordant" & annot_rna_joint_alv %in% c("Alv") ~ "Concordant Alv",
      TRUE ~ "Discordant"
      ),
    
  fate_rna_epi = dplyr::case_when(
      concordance_rna_epi == "Concordant" & annot_epi == "LP" ~ "Concordant LP",
      concordance_rna_epi == "Concordant" & annot_epi %in% c("basal") ~ "Concordant basal",
      concordance_rna_epi == "Concordant" & annot_epi %in% c("HS") ~ "Concordant HS",
      concordance_rna_epi == "Concordant" & annot_epi %in% c("Alv") ~ "Concordant Alv",
      TRUE ~ "Discordant"
  ))

```

```{r donut2, message=F, warning=F}
df_donut <- bind_rows(
  df_cells %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(Group), !is.na(fate_facs_rna)) %>%
    dplyr::count(Group, status = fate_facs_rna) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(transition = "FACS → RNA"),
  
  df_cells %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(Group), !is.na(fate_rna_epi)) %>%
    dplyr::count(Group, status = fate_rna_epi) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(transition = "RNA → EPI")
) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Group, transition) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    frac = n / sum(n),
    ymax = cumsum(frac),
    ymin = lag(ymax, default = 0),
    label = paste0(round(frac * 100), "%")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()


df_donut$status <- factor(
  df_donut$status,
  levels = c(
    "Concordant LP",
    "Concordant Alv",
    "Concordant HS",
    "Concordant basal",
    "Discordant"
  )
)

donut_cols <- c(
  "Concordant LP" = "#a3215e",
  "Concordant Alv" = "#f7dcad",
  "Concordant HS" = "#F9C22EFF",
  "Concordant basal" = "#236ec4",
  "Discordant" = "grey60"
)

p_donut_fate <- ggplot(
  df_donut,
  aes(ymax = ymax, ymin = ymin, xmax = 2, xmin = 1.2, fill = status)
) +
  geom_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_text(
    data = df_donut %>% dplyr::filter(frac > 0.04),
    aes(
      x = 1.7,
      y = (ymin + ymax) / 2,
      label = label
    ),
    size = 3
  ) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  xlim(c(0.5, 2.5)) +
  facet_grid(Group ~ transition) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = donut_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

p_donut_fate
```

```{r save_donuts, message=F, warning=F, eval=F, include=F}
ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "donut_both_new.pdf"),
       plot = p_donut_both,
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 300,
       height = 200)

ggsave(file.path(outputDir_plots, "donut_both_fate_new.pdf"),
       plot = p_donut_fate,
       device = "pdf",
       units = "mm",
       width = 200,
       height = 200)

```

# Diffusion maps
```{r prep, message=F, warning=F}
seurat@graphs <- list()
seurat_rna@graphs <- list()
```


## K4
```{r diff_k4, message=F, warning=F}
p_all_k4 <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(seurat,
                   reduction = "diffusion_spectral_k4",
                   dims = c(1, 3),
                   group.by = c("annot_k4_joint"),
                   colors.use = cell_cols) + ggtitle("All cells, LP-basal transition")

cells.use <- colnames(seurat)[seurat$condition == "CreP_LATE"]
p_late_k4 <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(
  seurat,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_k4",
  dims = c(1, 3),
  cells.highlight = cells.use,
  colors.use = "#61980e"
) + ggtitle("CREpos late, LP-basal transition")

cells.use <- colnames(seurat)[seurat$condition == "CreP_EARLY"]
p_early_k4 <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(
  seurat,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_k4",
  dims = c(1, 3),
  cells.highlight = cells.use,
  colors.use = "#c0d69f"
) + ggtitle("CREpos early, LP-basal transition")

cells.use <- colnames(seurat)[seurat$condition == "CreN"]
p_neg_k4 <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(
  subset(seurat, cells = cells.use),
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_k4",
  dims = c(1, 3),
  group.by = c("annot_k4_joint"),
  colors.use = cell_cols
) + ggtitle("CREneg, LP-basal transition")

DefaultAssay(seurat) <- "bin_5k_h3k4me1"
cells.use <- colnames(seurat)[!is.na(seurat$DPT_K4_BLP_from_lp_ext)]

p_dpt_k4_purple <- SCpubr::do_FeaturePlot(
  seurat,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_k4",
  dims = c(1,3),
  features = "DPT_K4_BLP_from_lp_ext",
  cells = cells.use,
  sequential.palette = "Purples"
)

cells.use <- colnames(seurat)[!is.na(seurat$DPT_K4_BLP_from_lp_ext) & seurat$condition == "CreP_EARLY"]
p_dpt_k4_purple_early <- SCpubr::do_FeaturePlot(
  seurat,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_k4",
  dims = c(1,3),
  features = "DPT_K4_BLP_from_lp_ext",
  cells = cells.use,
  sequential.palette = "Purples"
)

cells.use <- colnames(seurat)[!is.na(seurat$DPT_K4_BLP_from_lp_ext) & seurat$condition == "CreP_LATE"]
p_dpt_k4_purple_late <- SCpubr::do_FeaturePlot(
  seurat,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_k4",
  dims = c(1,3),
  features = "DPT_K4_BLP_from_lp_ext",
  cells = cells.use,
  sequential.palette = "Purples"
)

cells.use <- colnames(seurat)[!is.na(seurat$DPT_K4_BLP_from_lp_ext) & seurat$condition == "CreN"]
p_dpt_k4_purple_neg <- SCpubr::do_FeaturePlot(
  seurat,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_k4",
  dims = c(1,3),
  features = "DPT_K4_BLP_from_lp_ext",
  cells = cells.use,
  sequential.palette = "Purples"
)

p_all_k4 | p_dpt_k4_purple
p_neg_k4 |  p_dpt_k4_purple_neg
p_early_k4 |  p_dpt_k4_purple_early
p_late_k4 | p_dpt_k4_purple_late

```

## K27

```{r diff_k27, message=F, warning=F}
p_all_k27 <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(seurat,
                   reduction = "diffusion_spectral_k27",
                   dims = c(1, 3),
                   group.by = c("annot_k27_joint"),
                   colors.use = cell_cols) + ggtitle("All cells, LP-basal transition")

cells.use <- colnames(seurat)[seurat$condition == "CreP_LATE"]
p_late_k27 <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(
  seurat,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_k27",
  dims = c(1, 3),
  cells.highlight = cells.use,
  colors.use = "#61980e"
) + ggtitle("CreP late, LP-basal transition")

cells.use <- colnames(seurat)[seurat$condition == "CreP_EARLY"]
p_early_k27 <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(
  seurat,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_k27",
  dims = c(1, 3),
  cells.highlight = cells.use,
  colors.use = "#c0d69f"
) + ggtitle("CreP early, LP-basal transition")

cells.use <- colnames(seurat)[seurat$condition == "CreN"]
p_neg_k27 <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(
  subset(seurat, cells = cells.use),
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_k27",
  dims = c(1, 3),
  group.by = c("annot_k27_joint"),
  colors.use = cell_cols
) + ggtitle("CreN early, LP-basal transition")

DefaultAssay(seurat) <- "bin_5k_h3k27me3"
cells.use <- colnames(seurat)[!is.na(seurat$DPT_K27_BLP_from_lp)]
p_dpt_k27_purple <- SCpubr::do_FeaturePlot(
  seurat,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_k27",
  dims = c(1,3),
  features = "DPT_K27_BLP_from_lp",
  cells = cells.use,
  sequential.palette = "Purples"
)

cells.use <- colnames(seurat)[!is.na(seurat$DPT_K27_BLP_from_lp) & seurat$condition == "CreP_EARLY"]
p_dpt_k27_purple_early <- SCpubr::do_FeaturePlot(
  seurat,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_k27",
  dims = c(1,3),
  features = "DPT_K27_BLP_from_lp",
  cells = cells.use,
  sequential.palette = "Purples"
)

cells.use <- colnames(seurat)[!is.na(seurat$DPT_K27_BLP_from_lp) & seurat$condition == "CreP_LATE"]
p_dpt_k27_purple_late <- SCpubr::do_FeaturePlot(
  seurat,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_k27",
  dims = c(1,3),
  features = "DPT_K27_BLP_from_lp",
  cells = cells.use,
  sequential.palette = "Purples"
)

cells.use <- colnames(seurat)[!is.na(seurat$DPT_K27_BLP_from_lp) & seurat$condition == "CreN"]
p_dpt_k27_purple_neg <- SCpubr::do_FeaturePlot(
  seurat,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_k27",
  dims = c(1,3),
  features = "DPT_K27_BLP_from_lp",
  cells = cells.use,
  sequential.palette = "Purples"
)

p_all_k27 | p_dpt_k27_purple 
p_neg_k27 |  p_dpt_k27_purple_neg
p_early_k27 |  p_dpt_k27_purple_early
p_late_k27 | p_dpt_k27_purple_late

```

## RNA

```{r di_rna, message=F, warning=F}
p_all_rna <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(seurat_rna,
                   reduction = "diffusion_spectral_rna",
                   group.by = c("annot_rna_joint"),
                   colors.use = cell_cols) + ggtitle("All cells, LP-basal transition")

cells.use <- colnames(seurat_rna)[seurat_rna$condition == "CreP_LATE"]
p_late_rna <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(
  seurat_rna,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_rna",
  cells.highlight = cells.use,
  colors.use = "#61980e"
) + ggtitle("CreP late, LP-basal transition")

cells.use <- colnames(seurat_rna)[seurat_rna$condition == "CreP_EARLY"]
p_early_rna <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(
  seurat_rna,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_rna",
  cells.highlight = cells.use,
  colors.use = "#c0d69f"
) + ggtitle("CreP early, LP-basal transition")

cells.use <- colnames(seurat_rna)[seurat_rna$condition == "CreN"]
p_neg_rna <- SCpubr::do_DimPlot(
  subset(seurat_rna, cells = cells.use),
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_rna",
  group.by = c("annot_rna_joint"),
  colors.use = cell_cols
) + ggtitle("CreN, LP-basal transition")

DefaultAssay(seurat_rna) <- "SCT_umi"
cells.use <- colnames(seurat_rna)[!is.na(seurat_rna$DPT_RNA_BLP_from_lp)]
p_dpt_rna_purple <- SCpubr::do_FeaturePlot(
  seurat_rna,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_rna",
  features = "DPT_RNA_BLP_from_lp",
  cells = cells.use,
  sequential.palette = "Purples"
)

cells.use <- colnames(seurat_rna)[!is.na(seurat_rna$DPT_RNA_BLP_from_lp) & seurat_rna$condition == "CreP_EARLY"]
p_dpt_rna_purple_early <- SCpubr::do_FeaturePlot(
  seurat_rna,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_rna",
  features = "DPT_RNA_BLP_from_lp",
  cells = cells.use,
  sequential.palette = "Purples"
)

cells.use <- colnames(seurat_rna)[!is.na(seurat_rna$DPT_RNA_BLP_from_lp) & seurat_rna$condition == "CreP_LATE"]
p_dpt_rna_purple_late <- SCpubr::do_FeaturePlot(
  seurat_rna,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_rna",
  features = "DPT_RNA_BLP_from_lp",
  cells = cells.use,
  sequential.palette = "Purples"
)

cells.use <- colnames(seurat_rna)[!is.na(seurat_rna$DPT_RNA_BLP_from_lp) & seurat_rna$condition == "CreN"]
p_dpt_rna_purple_neg <- SCpubr::do_FeaturePlot(
  seurat_rna,
  reduction = "diffusion_spectral_rna",
  features = "DPT_RNA_BLP_from_lp",
  cells = cells.use,
  sequential.palette = "Purples"
)

p_all_rna | p_dpt_rna_purple 
p_neg_rna |  p_dpt_rna_purple_neg
p_early_rna | p_dpt_rna_purple_early
p_late_rna |  p_dpt_rna_purple_late

```

# Ridge plots LP-basal transition

```{r ridge1, message=F, warning=F}
seurat$condition_ridge2 <- dplyr::case_when(
  seurat$annot_k4_joint == "basal" & seurat$Group %in% c("CreN", "Rosa") ~ "CreN_basal_k4",
  seurat$annot_k4_joint == "LP"    & seurat$Group %in% c("CreN", "Rosa") ~ "CreN_lp_k4",
  seurat$annot_k4_joint == "HS"    & seurat$Group %in% c("CreN", "Rosa") ~ "CreN_hs_k4",
  seurat$annot_k27_joint == "basal" & seurat$Group %in% c("CreN", "Rosa") ~ "CreN_basal_k27",
  seurat$annot_k27_joint == "LP"    & seurat$Group %in% c("CreN", "Rosa") ~ "CreN_lp_k27",
  seurat$annot_k27_joint == "HS"    & seurat$Group %in% c("CreN", "Rosa") ~ "CreN_hs_k27",
  
  seurat$annot_k4_joint == "basal" & seurat$Group %in% c("CreP_EARLY", "CreP_LATE") ~ "CreP_basal_k4",
  seurat$annot_k4_joint == "LP"    & seurat$Group %in% c("CreP_EARLY", "CreP_LATE") ~ "CreP_lp_k4",
  seurat$annot_k4_joint == "HS"    & seurat$Group %in% c("CreP_EARLY", "CreP_LATE") ~ "CreP_hs_k4",
  seurat$annot_k27_joint == "basal" & seurat$Group %in% c("CreP_EARLY", "CreP_LATE") ~ "CreP_basal_k27",
  seurat$annot_k27_joint == "LP"    & seurat$Group %in% c("CreP_EARLY", "CreP_LATE") ~ "CreP_lp_k27",
  seurat$annot_k27_joint == "HS"    & seurat$Group %in% c("CreP_EARLY", "CreP_LATE") ~ "CreP_hs_k27",
  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)

seurat_rna$condition_ridge2 <- dplyr::case_when(
  seurat_rna$annot_rna_joint == "basal" &
    seurat_rna$Group %in% c("CreN", "Rosa") ~ "CreN_basal_rna",

  seurat_rna$annot_rna_joint == "LP" &
    seurat_rna$Group %in% c("CreN", "Rosa") ~ "CreN_lp_rna",

  seurat_rna$annot_rna_joint == "HS" &
    seurat_rna$Group %in% c("CreN", "Rosa") ~ "CreN_hs_rna",

  seurat_rna$annot_rna_joint == "basal" &
    seurat_rna$Group %in% c("CreP_EARLY", "CreP_LATE") ~ "CreP_basal_rna",

  seurat_rna$annot_rna_joint == "LP" &
    seurat_rna$Group %in% c("CreP_EARLY", "CreP_LATE") ~ "CreP_lp_rna",

  seurat_rna$annot_rna_joint == "HS" &
    seurat_rna$Group %in% c("CreP_EARLY", "CreP_LATE") ~ "CreP_hs_rna",

  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)

seurat_rna$condition_ridge2 <- dplyr::case_when(
  seurat_rna$annot_rna_joint == "basal" &
  seurat_rna$Group %in% c("CreN", "Rosa") ~ "CreN_basal_rna",
  seurat_rna$annot_rna_joint == "LP" &
  seurat_rna$Group %in% c("CreN", "Rosa") ~ "CreN_lp_rna",
  seurat_rna$annot_rna_joint == "HS" &
  seurat_rna$Group %in% c("CreN", "Rosa") ~ "CreN_hs_rna",
  seurat_rna$annot_rna_joint == "basal" &
  seurat_rna$Group %in% c("CreP_EARLY", "CreP_LATE") ~ "CreP_basal_rna",
  seurat_rna$annot_rna_joint == "LP" &
  seurat_rna$Group %in% c("CreP_EARLY", "CreP_LATE") ~ "CreP_lp_rna",
  seurat_rna$annot_rna_joint == "HS" &
  seurat_rna$Group %in% c("CreP_EARLY", "CreP_LATE") ~ "CreP_hs_rna",
  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)

condition_order2 <- c(
  "CreP_hs_rna",
  "CreN_hs_rna",
  "CreP_basal_rna",
  "CreN_basal_rna",
  "CreP_lp_rna",
  "CreN_lp_rna"
)

seurat_rna$condition_ridge2 <- factor(
  seurat_rna$condition_ridge2,
  levels = condition_order2
)

condition_cols2 <- c(CreN_basal_k4 = "#236ec4",
                     CreN_lp_k4 = "#a3215e",
                     CreN_hs_k4 = "#F9C22EFF",
                     CreN_basal_k27 = "#236ec4",
                     CreN_lp_k27 = "#a3215e",
                     CreN_hs_k27 = "#F9C22EFF",
                     CreP_basal_k4 = "#61980e",
                     CreP_lp_k4 = "#61980e",
                     CreP_hs_k4 = "#61980e",
                     CreP_basal_k27 = "#61980e",
                     CreP_lp_k27 = "#61980e",
                     CreP_hs_k27 = "#61980e",
                     CreN_basal_rna = "#236ec4",
                     CreN_lp_rna = "#a3215e",
                     CreN_hs_rna = "#F9C22EFF",
                     CreP_basal_rna = "#61980e",
                     CreP_lp_rna = "#61980e",
                     CreP_hs_rna = "#61980e",
                     CreP_basal_rna = "#61980e"
                     ) 
```

```{r ridge2, message=F, warning=F}
cells_use <- WhichCells(seurat, expression = !is.na(DPT_K4_BLP_from_lp_ext))
DefaultAssay(seurat) <- "bin_5k_h3k4me1"
p_ridge_k4_2 <- RidgePlot(subset(seurat, cells = cells_use), features = c("DPT_K4_BLP_from_lp_ext"), group.by = "condition_ridge2", cols = condition_cols2, sort = FALSE)
p_ridge_k4_2

cells_use <- WhichCells(seurat, expression = !is.na(DPT_K27_BLP_from_lp))
DefaultAssay(seurat) <- "bin_5k_h3k27me3"
p_ridge_k27_2 <- RidgePlot(subset(seurat, cells = cells_use), features = c("DPT_K27_BLP_from_lp"), group.by = "condition_ridge2", cols = condition_cols2, sort = FALSE)

p_ridge_k27_2

df_plot <- FetchData(
  seurat_rna,
  vars = c(
    "condition_ridge2",
    "DPT_RNA_BLP_from_lp"
  )
) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(condition_ridge2),
    !is.na(DPT_RNA_BLP_from_lp)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    condition_ridge2 = factor(
      condition_ridge2,
      levels = condition_order2
    )
  )

cells_use <- rownames(df_plot)
obj_tmp <- subset(
  seurat_rna,
  cells = cells_use
)

obj_tmp$condition_ridge2 <- factor(
  obj_tmp$condition_ridge2,
  levels = condition_order2
)

p_ridge_rna2 <- RidgePlot(
  object = obj_tmp,
  features = "DPT_RNA_BLP_from_lp",
  group.by = "condition_ridge2",
  cols = condition_cols2[condition_order2],
  sort = FALSE
)

p_ridge_rna2
```
